title: iPad
lead: Cachly adapts to the bigger iPad screen with a sidebar and split views instead of a bottom tab bar — the same features, arranged to take advantage of the space.

sections.heading: iPad layout
sections.text: On iPad, Cachly uses an adaptive split-view layout : a list or sidebar alongside the map or detail view, so you can see a cache’s details and its position at the same time. It also supports iPadOS multitasking, so you can run Cachly beside another app. 🖥 With iCloud sync on, lists and data you set up on iPad are ready on your iPhone in the field.

sections.heading: Everything else is the same
sections.text: The capabilities described throughout this guide — the map , logging , search , offline maps and more — are all present on iPad, just laid out for the larger display.
